contradictions.summary: Sales call suggested onboarding can start in 7 days, but the SOW requires kickoff within 15 business days after security approval, signed BAA, and PO.

claimA.text: If procurement moves, onboarding can start in 7 days.

claimB.text: Kickoff occurs within 15 business days after security approval, signed BAA, and procurement PO are complete.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Use SOW language in customer-facing follow-up and clarify that the 7-day statement was conditional, not a committed kickoff date.

contradictions.summary: Customer expects a security packet by Friday, but penetration test attestation is not available until June 3.

claimA.text: The security packet must include SOC 2, encryption overview, subprocessors, and audit log description by Friday.

claimB.text: Penetration test attestation is not available until June 3.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Send approved materials immediately and explicitly state that penetration test attestation follows on June 3.
